body:
Genre: Horror • Survival • Exploration • Multiplayer•Mechanics

Description:
Welcome to Shadows of the Depths, a chilling horror modpack that will test your sanity and survival instincts. The world you once knew is gone — night never truly ends, and every sound in the dark could be your last.
Venture through cursed forests, abandoned villages, and forgotten ruins filled with unspeakable horrors. Gather resources, build shelters, and keep the lights burning... because when the darkness falls, they come out.

Key Features:
🔦 Immersive Horror Atmosphere — Dynamic lighting, fog, and ambient sounds to keep you on edge.
👹 Terrifying Monsters — Custom mobs that stalk you silently or strike when you least expect it.
🪓 Survival Mechanics — Hunger, sanity, and temperature systems that make every decision matter.
🏚️ Exploration & Lore — Discover journals, ruins, and hidden secrets that tell the story of a world consumed by evil.
🎧 3D Sound & Music — Creeping footsteps behind you, whispers in the dark — wear headphones for full immersion.

Recommended For:

Players who enjoy survival horror and atmosphere over fast gameplay.

Friends who love screaming together in voice chat.

Streamers who want to terrify their audience. WARNING:DO NOT UPDATE IT
